title: Our Policies - Leads University
markdown:
# Our policies

## Policies for Lahore LEADS University

At Lahore LEADS University, accessible from leads.edu.pk, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Policies document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Lahore LEADS University and how we use it.

## List of Policies

- [1) Academic Policy](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/academic-policy.pdf)
- [2) HR Policy](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/HR-Policy.pdf)
- [3) Policy on Sexual Harassment](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Policy-on-Sexual-Harassment.pdf)
- [4) Data Protection Policy](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Data-Protection-Policy.pdf)
- [5) Plagiarism Policy](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Plagiarism-Policy.pdf)
- [6) HEC Policy Disabilities](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/HEC-Policy-Disabilities.pdf)
- [7) HEC Policy on Drugs and Tobacco Abuse in HEIs (2021)](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/HEC-Policy-on-Drugs-and-Tobacco-Abuse-in-HEIs-2021.pdf)
